input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a CollectionView with single selection and pull-to-refresh:

**XAML:**
```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">
    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:MyItem">
                <Grid Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
                </Grid>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel bindings needed:**

| Property | Type | Purpose |
|----------|------|---------|
| `Items` | `ObservableCollection<MyItem>` | Data source |
| `SelectedItem` | `MyItem` | Triggers navigation on set |
| `IsRefreshing` | `bool` | Controls refresh spinner |
| `RefreshCommand` | `IAsyncRelayCommand` | Calls your API |

**ViewModel sketch (using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm):**
```csharp
[ObservableProperty]
private bool _isRefreshing;

[ObservableProperty]
private MyItem? _selectedItem;

partial void OnSelectedItemChanged(MyItem? value)
{
    if (value is null) return;
    // Navigate, then clear selection
    Shell.Current.GoToAsync(nameof(DetailPage), new Dictionary<string, object>
    {
        ["Item"] = value
    });
    SelectedItem = null;
}

[RelayCommand]
private async Task RefreshAsync()
{
    Items = new ObservableCollection<MyItem>(await _api.GetItemsAsync());
    IsRefreshing = false;
}
```

**Key points:**
- Wrap `CollectionView` in `RefreshView` — the pull gesture binds to `RefreshCommand`.
- Set `IsRefreshing = false` when done or the spinner won't dismiss.
- Clear `SelectedItem` after navigation so the same item can be re-selected.
- `SelectionMode="Single"` ensures only one item highlights at a time.
